arts.ttl: Two Leicester City youngsters seal loan transfers
arts.sum: Leicester City right-back Brandon Cover is heading back to League Two after sealing a loan switch to Fleetwood Town. Cover impressed at Port Vale in the first half of the season, but with injured players returning for the Staffordshire club, the 21-year-old’s game-time looked set to reduce in the second half of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Expect Everton transfer business - but plans could change in 90 minutes

arts.ttl: Everton weighing up Armando Broja gamble as club seeks solution to striker crisis
arts.sum: David Moyes is eager to bring in another forward but the market is proving so tough that Everton may opt to hold on to what they already have

arts.ttl: David Moyes delivers Everton reality check despite transfer breakthrough
arts.sum: Everton take on Leicester City on Saturday in a huge clash at the bottom of the Premier League, but there's work going on behind the scenes to bolster the Toffees' squad

arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted XI v Everton with five players competing for two places
arts.sum: A fit Mads Hermansen will come straight back into the Leicester City starting line-up at Everton with Ruud van Nistelrooy’s most difficult decisions again coming on the wings. Hermansen is back in City training after more than a month out with a groin issue and van Nistelrooy has said, all being well, he will be available for selection at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Everton 'reach agreement' for Alcaraz loan deal
arts.sum: Everton have "reached an agreement" to sign midfielder Carlos Alcaraz on a loan deal from Flamengo, according to the Brazilian club.
